title: First screen, Continue button
scenario: Onboarding first screen Continue button navigates to second screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data).
Observe the first onboarding screen displayed.
Verify the 'Continue' button is present at the bottom of the screen.
expected: The Continue button is visible at the bottom of the first onboarding screen. Tapping it navigates to the second onboarding screen.
